items.title: AJ Dybantsa Meets With Kyshawn George and John Wall
items.author: AJ Dybantsa
items.body_excerpt: While at a Washington Mystics game, at the day after the NBA draft, AJ Dybantsa linked up with Washington Wizards legend John Wall and current Wizard Kyshawn George. SUBSCRIBE: https://www.youtube.com/@aj.dybantsa?sub_confirmation=1 TEXT ME: +1 508-960-7999 MY SOCIAL MEDIA:…
